'''chofavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keepsaky|keepsaky]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keepsaky|keepsaky]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chofavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofavithi|chofavithi]] || [[word:chofaviji|chofaviji]] || [[word:chofavishi|chofavishi]] || [[word:chofaviki|chofaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofavuthuthu|chofavuthuthu]] || [[word:chofavujuju|chofavujuju]] || [[word:chofavushushu|chofavushushu]] || [[word:chofavukuku|chofavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofavuthu|chofavuthu]] || [[word:chofavuju|chofavuju]] || [[word:chofavushu|chofavushu]] || [[word:chofavuku|chofavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofavufthuf|chofavufthuf]] || [[word:chofavufjuf|chofavufjuf]] || [[word:chofavufshuf|chofavufshuf]] || [[word:chofavufkuf|chofavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofavethe|chofavethe]] || [[word:chofaveje|chofaveje]] || [[word:chofaveshe|chofaveshe]] || [[word:chofaveke|chofaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofavothotho|chofavothotho]] || [[word:chofavojojo|chofavojojo]] || [[word:chofavoshosho|chofavoshosho]] || [[word:chofavokoko|chofavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofavotho|chofavotho]] || [[word:chofavojo|chofavojo]] || [[word:chofavosho|chofavosho]] || [[word:chofavoko|chofavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofavofthof|chofavofthof]] || [[word:chofavofjof|chofavofjof]] || [[word:chofavofshof|chofavofshof]] || [[word:chofavofkof|chofavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofavïfthïf|chofavïfthïf]] || [[word:chofavïfjïf|chofavïfjïf]] || [[word:chofavïfshïf|chofavïfshïf]] || [[word:chofavïfkïf|chofavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofavïfthïfthïf|chofavïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:chofavïfjïfjïf|chofavïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:chofavïfshïfshïf|chofavïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:chofavïfkïfkïf|chofavïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofavïfthïf|chofavïfthïf]] || [[word:chofavïfjïf|chofavïfjïf]] || [[word:chofavïfshïf|chofavïfshïf]] || [[word:chofavïfkïf|chofavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofavïfthïf|chofavïfthïf]] || [[word:chofavïfjïf|chofavïfjïf]] || [[word:chofavïfshïf|chofavïfshïf]] || [[word:chofavïfkïf|chofavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofavæthæ|chofavæthæ]] || [[word:chofavæjæ|chofavæjæ]] || [[word:chofavæshæ|chofavæshæ]] || [[word:chofavækæ|chofavækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofavathatha|chofavathatha]] || [[word:chofavajaja|chofavajaja]] || [[word:chofavashasha|chofavashasha]] || [[word:chofavakaka|chofavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofavatha|chofavatha]] || [[word:chofavaja|chofavaja]] || [[word:chofavasha|chofavasha]] || [[word:chofavaka|chofavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofavafthaf|chofavafthaf]] || [[word:chofavafjaf|chofavafjaf]] || [[word:chofavafshaf|chofavafshaf]] || [[word:chofavafkaf|chofavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chofavasha|chofavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofavshësha|chofavshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofavrosha|chofavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofavmusha|chofavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofavyasha|chofavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofavnkshësha|gochofavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofavnkrosha|gochofavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofavnkmusha|gochofavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofavnkyasha|gochofavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chofafavasha|chofafavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofafavshësha|chofafavshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofafavrosha|chofafavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofafavmusha|chofafavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofafavyasha|chofafavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofafavnkshësha|gochofafavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofafavnkrosha|gochofafavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofafavnkmusha|gochofafavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofafavnkyasha|gochofafavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chefævasha|chefævasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chefævshësha|chefævshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chefævrosha|chefævrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chefævmusha|chefævmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chefævyasha|chefævyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochefævnkshësha|gochefævnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochefævnkrosha|gochefævnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochefævnkmusha|gochefævnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochefævnkyasha|gochefævnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chofavasha|chofavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofavshësha|chofavshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofavrosha|chofavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofavmusha|chofavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofavyasha|chofavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofavnkshësha|gochofavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofavnkrosha|gochofavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofavnkmusha|gochofavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofavnkyasha|gochofavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
